word: G319 - ἀναγνωρίζομαι - anagnōrízomai - an-ag-no-rid'-zom-ahee - Be made known

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀναγνωρίζομαι

- Transliteration: Anagnorizomai

- Phonetic: an-ag-no-rid'-zom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to recognise

- Origin: middle voice from G303 and G1107

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Middle voice from G303 and G1107; to make (oneself) known: - be made known.
